palaces.疾厄: Your physical hardware and health foundation
palaces.遷移: Your external interface and how others see you
palaces.官祿: Your career track and execution strength
palaces.福德: Your spiritual depth and inner balance

stars.emperor:
Core Essence: Central Authority & Inner Sovereignty
You carry structural presence and strategic gravity.
At maturity, you stabilize and integrate systems.
In imbalance, you over-control or seek validation.
Your evolution is not dominance—but becoming a trusted center.
stars.advisor:
Core Essence: Adaptive Intelligence
Strategic, perceptive, flexible.
Shadow appears as over-analysis.
Growth comes from converting insight into motion.
stars.sun:
Core Essence: Radiance & Influence
In strength, you energize and lead visibility.
In imbalance, you burn out.
Your mastery lies in purposeful expression.
stars.general:
Core Essence: Precision & Execution
Disciplined and result-oriented.
Shadow manifests as rigidity.
True mastery blends structure with humanity.
stars.fortunate:
Core Essence: Ease & Harmony
Calming, inclusive, relational.
Shadow: avoidance.
Strength lies in gentle resilience.
stars.judge:
Core Essence: Emotional Intensity & Transformation
Magnetic and perceptive.
Shadow: fixation.
Growth comes from integration.
stars.empress:
Core Essence: Resource Stewardship
Stable and grounded.
Shadow: stagnation.
Strength grows through steady expansion.
stars.moon:
Core Essence: Reflective Awareness
Intuitive and perceptive.
Shadow: insecurity.
Sensitivity becomes wisdom when owned.
stars.wolf:
Core Essence: Creative Desire
Dynamic and expressive.
Shadow: indulgence.
Power emerges through focus.
stars.advocator:
Core Essence: Discernment & Expression
Thoughtful and analytical.
Shadow: negativity.
Clarity becomes influence.
stars.minister:
Core Essence: Diplomacy & Balance
Fair and composed.
Shadow: self-erasure.
Alignment requires boundaries.
stars.sage:
Core Essence: Protection & Integrity
Principled and dependable.
Shadow: rigidity.
Wisdom lies in adaptive guardianship.
stars.marshal:
Core Essence: Radical Initiative
Bold and transformative.
Shadow: recklessness.
Courage must meet discipline.
stars.rebel:
Core Essence: Structural Reset
Innovative and disruptive.
Shadow: chaos.
True reform carries responsibility.
stars.officer:
Symbolizes external support and social leverage.
In balance, you attract assistance naturally; in imbalance, you rely too heavily on validation.
stars.helper:
Represents internal alignment and self-correction.
In strength, you refine yourself constantly; in imbalance, perfectionism creates pressure.
stars.scholar:
Symbolizes cognitive clarity and structured thinking.
At maturity, it sharpens articulation; in excess, it remains intellectual without execution.
stars.artist:
Represents aesthetic intelligence and emotional refinement.
In balance, feeling becomes creativity; in imbalance, emotion overwhelms direction.
stars.money:
Symbolizes material stability and resource retention.
Balanced, it builds long-term assets; imbalanced, it clings to security.
stars.horse:
Represents movement and expansion energy.
In strength, it enables breakthroughs; in excess, it scatters focus.
stars.assistant:
Symbolizes external opportunity and authority support.
In balance, doors open at the right time; in imbalance, dependency forms.
stars.aide:
Represents inner guidance and intuitive intelligence.
Balanced, intuition sharpens timing; imbalanced, perception becomes projection.
stars.driven:
Symbolizes sharp boundaries and confrontation.
In strength, it protects; in imbalance, it becomes aggression.
stars.tangled:
Represents inertia and delay loops.
Balanced, it builds endurance; imbalanced, it stalls momentum.
stars.impulsive:
Symbolizes explosive drive and urgency.
Balanced, it fuels decisive action; imbalanced, it burns recklessly.
stars.spark:
Represents anxiety frequency and alertness.
In balance, it sharpens awareness; in imbalance, it creates constant tension.
stars.ideologue:
Symbolizes existential awareness and impermanence.
Balanced, it brings depth; imbalanced, it creates emptiness.
stars.fickle:
Represents loss imprint and collapse memory.
Balanced, it brings detachment; imbalanced, it clings to fear.
stars.serious: Strong inner moral pressure, often self-critical to an extreme.
stars.frail: Tends toward existential doubt and questioning meaning.
stars.broken: Sensitive to fragmentation, driven to fix what feels incomplete.
stars.fancied: Periods of uncertainty and unclear direction.
stars.interrupted: Feels disruption sharply and seeks restored continuity.
stars.alone: Strong independence paired with a longing for deep connection.
stars.lonely: Emotionally detached at times, sensitive to belonging.
stars.upset: Deeply sensitive to loss and unresolved emotions.
stars.social: Strong romantic magnetism with a tendency to idealize.
stars.gifted: Strong technical ability and breakthrough potential.
stars.passionate: Strong sensual pull that may distract emotionally.
stars.murder: Intense competitive pressure, often facing sharp turning points.
stars.utopian: A noticeable gap between ideals and reality.
stars.considery: Strong ability to resolve crises and untangle problems.
stars.cheerful: Favors social harmony and supportive connections.
stars.solemn: Strong awareness of structure, order, and hierarchy.
stars.lucky: Brings a steady sense of protection and fortune.
stars.sickly: Emotionally sensitive and perceptive to subtle shifts.
stars.noble: Timely support appears at critical moments.
stars.bottomless: Effort may not immediately translate into visible results.
stars.wounded: Stress may manifest as physical or emotional strain.
stars.heaven: Strong sense of duty and service toward others.
stars.gourmet: Appreciates comfort, taste, and refined living.
stars.blessed: Upright conduct that earns trust naturally.
stars.nianjie: Annual obstacles tend to resolve more smoothly.

tenGods.食神: Output and creation, enjoyment and expression
tenGods.正印: Protection and nourishment, knowledge and benefactors

木.headline: Strategy module
木.content: Wood energy represents your strategy module, the built-in system for your expansion and initiation. When strong, you plan well, are willing to start, and can run multiple threads; when weak, you hesitate, struggle to launch, and lack strategic thinking. Use this energy for long-term strategy and starting new projects to boost execution and growth. When over-relying, you may plan too much and execute too little. This year, practice direct action—let strategy guide action rather than delay.

火.headline: Propulsion module
火.content: Fire energy represents your propulsion module, the built-in system for execution and burst. When strong, you advance quickly with high execution; when weak, you lack momentum and struggle to push through. Use this energy for key tasks and decisive execution to boost efficiency and output. When over-relying, you may burn out. This year, practice managing output rhythm so each push has more endurance.

土.headline: Endurance module
土.content: Earth energy represents your endurance module, the built-in system for settling and accumulation. When strong, you persist, accumulate results, and build systems; when weak, you struggle to sustain and lack foundation. Use this energy for long-term assets and stable workflows to boost accumulation and stability. When over-relying, you may become too conservative. This year, practice balancing accumulation with innovation.

金.headline: Decisiveness module
金.content: Metal energy represents your decisiveness module, the built-in system for cutting and logical discipline. When strong, you decide decisively, cut clearly, and establish processes; when weak, you struggle to decide and lack standards. Use this energy for clear processes and decision criteria to boost efficiency and quality. When over-relying, you may become too harsh. This year, practice balancing efficiency with humanity.

水.headline: Insight module
水.content: Water energy represents your insight module, the built-in system for perception and data processing. When strong, you think deeply, discern well, and handle complex information; when weak, you experience mental exhaustion and narrow vision. Use this energy for deep thinking and information integration to boost decision quality. When over-relying, you may overthink and underact. This year, practice balancing thought with action.
